CPSD - College Park Scholars- Science, Discovery & the Universe

CPSD100 College Park Scholars: Science, Discovery & the Universe First- Year Colloquium A (1 Credit) Introductory colloquium: Examination of issues related to science, discovery and the universe. Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Science, Discovery & the Universe (CPSD) program. Additional Information: Both freshman colloquia (CPSD 100 and 101) are required for students to earn their College Park Scholars citations; however, they can be taken in any order during a student's ﬁrst year.
